report.summary: Drafted 5 tweets (#340-344) for Apr 14–19 covering Liberation Day tariff shock ($5T+ S&P wipeout, BTC -3% to $66.2K), DeFi vaults education, $286M Drift Protocol exploit security alert, extreme fear DCA historical analysis, and weekly builder roundup. Newsletter v21 themed 'Liberation Day Shakes Markets, Fear Stays Extreme'. 2 new social card SVGs (Liberation Day Tariffs data card, Extreme Fear DCA 60-day analysis). Content calendar extends through Apr 19 across v21 cycle.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #340: Liberation Day Market Impact — 3-tweet data thread (Mon Apr 14, 2PM ET) covering $5T+ S&P 500 wipeout, BTC -3% to $66,246, ETH -4.4%, stablecoins at 85% of crypto volume ($91.5B), Fear & Greed at 8/100 for 60+ days. Links to Fear & Greed tool.

Tweet #341: DeFi Vaults & Automated Yield — 3-tweet educational thread (Tue Apr 15, 11AM ET) covering ERC-4626 composability revolution, Yearn V3 vs Beefy vs Morpho vs Sommelier comparison, vault risk framework (smart contract layering, IL, withdrawal timing). Links to DeFi Vaults guide.

Tweet #342: Drift Protocol $286M Exploit — 2-tweet security alert (Wed Apr 16, 3PM ET) covering North Korean state-backed cross-chain laundering on Solana, hardware wallet reminders, token approval hygiene. Links to Wallet Security guide.

Tweet #343: Extreme Fear DCA Historical Analysis — 2-tweet data thread (Fri Apr 18, 1PM ET) covering historical returns from DCA during extreme fear: Jun 2022 +58%, Nov 2022 +44%, Sep 2023 +82%, median sub-10 F&G 90-day return +62%. Links to DCA Calculator.
Tweet #344: Weekend Builder Roundup (Sat Apr 19, 11AM ET) — weekly recap covering Liberation Day tariffs, 60-day extreme fear record, Drift exploit, courses launch, 19 new learn guide builds.

Newsletter v21: 'Liberation Day Shakes Markets, Fear Stays Extreme' (Thu Apr 17, 10AM ET) — Market Pulse (BTC $66,246, ETH ~$1,950, F&G 8/100, stablecoin volume 85% of market), courses launch, 19 new guide builds, Worth Reading (DeFi Vaults + Wallet Security), Degen Corner (price-sentiment divergence analysis, Drift exploit security wake-up call).
Discord/Telegram: Courses launch announcement (Mon Apr 14, 5PM ET) + Security reminder post-Drift (Wed Apr 16, 3PM ET).
Total tweets all-time: 344 (5 new this cycle), content scheduled Apr 14–19

sections.title: Growth Trajectory Analysis
items: LIBERATION DAY TARIFF SHOCK (Apr 2): Trump announced 10% baseline tariffs on 50+ countries, reciprocal rates up to 50%. S&P 500 lost $5T+ (largest single-event drop on record). BTC fell to $66,246 (-3%), ETH to ~$1,950 (-4.4%). Tariffs effective Apr 5, full reciprocation by Apr 9. Fed Chair Powell expects higher inflation and lower growth — holding rates steady.

EXTREME FEAR RECORD EXTENDS: F&G Index at 8/100 with 60+ consecutive days of extreme fear. Longest sustained period since FTX collapse. Total crypto market cap $2.23T (-3.86% weekly). BTC dominance 56.2%. Historical sub-10 median 90-day return: +62%.

STABLECOIN FLIGHT TO SAFETY: Stablecoin volume hit $91.5B — 84.68% of total crypto 24h volume. Supply near ATH at $316B. This concentration signals capital preservation, not exit — dry powder positioning for next move.

DRIFT PROTOCOL EXPLOIT $286M: North Korean hackers suspected. Cross-chain laundering patterns on Solana harder to trace than EVM chains. Largest Solana DeFi exploit. Reinforces wallet security + audit hygiene narrative.

COURSES CATEGORY LAUNCHED: 7 free structured curricula live on degen0x — Crypto 101, DeFi Masterclass, Layer 2 Deep Dive, Solana Deep Dive, Crypto Security, RWA Tokenization, Crypto Trading. First structured educational offering.
19 NEW LEARN GUIDE BUILDS TODAY: DeFi Vaults, Appchains, GameFi, Memecoins Strategy, Copy Trading, and more across v1-v19 builds. 60+ learn guide pages on disk, 618 total published pages.
P0 DEPLOYMENT BLOCKER PERSISTS: 450+ uncommitted files. Production last deployed Mar 24. Courses, new guides, and API pages all queued. Commit+push remains single highest-leverage growth action.
NANSEN 70% BOTTOM BY JUNE: Crypto intelligence firm estimates 70% probability market bottoms by June depending on tariff negotiation trajectory.
